stemHtml: Except for a take-off or landing, an IFR flight has to be flown at a level which is not below the minimum flight altitude established by the State overflown. If no such minimum flight altitude has been established, what is the minimum altitude of an aircraft above the highest obstacle over high terrain, or in mountainous areas?

options.a: At least 2000 ft above the highest obstacle located within 6 km of the estimated position of the aircraft.
options.b: At least 2000 ft above the highest obstacle located within 8 km of the estimated position of the aircraft.
options.c: At least 1000 ft above the highest obstacle located within 8 km of the estimated position of the aircraft.
options.d: At least 1000 ft above the highest obstacle located within 6 km of the estimated position of the aircraft.
